name: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company that discovers, invents, grows, and develops medicines for the treatment of serious diseases and unmet medical needs. The company's approved medicines and product candidates are based on its proprietary technology, including its VelocImmune® technology. Regeneron has a portfolio of marketed products and a robust pipeline of product candidates across various therapeutic areas.
